name: Search API Overview
body: [{"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Search API provides flexible integration options for implementing search functionality on any platform, offering both low-level HTTP JSON routes and high-level SDKs and JavaScript libraries. This enables you to integrate search features using your preferred development tools while accessing the full range of search capabilities."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can choose between direct API integration for complete control or SDK-based approaches for easier implementation. The API supports both GET and POST requests with JSON payloads, enabling JSONP for cross-domain requests, which helps ensure you can implement search functionality that fits your specific technical architecture and development workflow."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Integration Options"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Maropost Merchandising Cloud (formerly Findify) provides a set of low- and high-level tools that can help you integrate on any platform using your favorite tools."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For the low-level integration we provide a set of HTTP JSON routes that give you access to all features and tools that we offer."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "On a high-level we provide a set of SDK and JS libraries that can ease the integration."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "\ud83d\udc4dWe recommend using high-level tools\n"}]}, {"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "We recommend using SDKs and especially JS Feedback library and use low-level API only for building new SDKs"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "HTTP Methods"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "All routes support both HTTP GET and HTTP POST verbs."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For POST requests, the request body must be JSON, with the Content-Type header set to application/json."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The GET requests can be used for JSONP. You can adjust the callback name thanks to the \"callback\" parameter."}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "POST Request"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "lang": "bash", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "curl -X POST https://api-v3.findify.io/v3/search \\"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "  -d '{\"key\": \"your-api-key\", \"query\": \"search-term\"}'"}]}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "GET Request (JSONP)"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "lang": "bash", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "curl \"https://api-v3.findify.io/v3/search?key=your-api-key&query=search-term&callback=myCallback\""}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
